full_text:
Yang Xiu (Dezu) 楊修 (德祖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Xiu (楊修), styledDezu (德祖), was born in Hongnong. A talented scholar and friend of Cao Zhi, helped Zhi cheat Cao Cao’s tests. Yang Xiu was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Yang Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
